origin.rebirth: Arash returns from the ancient legends when darkness threatens the balance of the worlds.

story.intro: A hero who once protected the borders of Persia is awakened again. His legendary arrow now carries the energy of light itself.
story.mission: Protect the boundaries between worlds and stop the spread of shadow energy.
story.enemy: The Shadow Empire that tries to break the connection between Earth and the ancient realms.

powers.name: Light Arrow
powers.description: Creates arrows made of pure cosmic light that can destroy darkness.

powers.name: Vision of Future
powers.description: Can see possible futures and choose the path of hope.

powers.name: Energy Horizon
powers.description: Creates a protective energy field around civilizations.

powers.name: Legendary Sacrifice
powers.description: Uses his ancient heroic spirit to unlock unlimited power.

cinematic.theme: Epic Persian music mixed with futuristic energy
cinematic.scene: Arash stands on a futuristic Persian battlefield. Darkness covers the sky. He pulls the legendary bow and releases an arrow of light that restores balance.
